mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_appointment (user_id, coach_id, appointment_time, duration, remark, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{coachId}, #{appointmentTime}, #{duration}, #{remark}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE coach_appointment SET user_id = #{userId}, coach_id = #{coachId}, appointment_time = #{appointmentTime}, duration = #{duration}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ca.*, u.username AS user_name, c.name AS coach_name FROM coach_appointment ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON ca.coach_id = c.id WHERE ca.id = #{id}

SELECT ca.*, u.username AS user_name, c.name AS coach_name FROM coach_appointment ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON ca.coach_id = c.id WHERE ca.coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY ca.create_time DESC

SELECT ca.*, u.username AS user_name, c.name AS coach_name FROM coach_appointment ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON ca.coach_id = c.id WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ca.create_time DESC

SELECT ca.*, u.username AS user_name, c.name AS coach_name FROM coach_appointment ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON ca.coach_id = c.id WHERE ca.status = #{status} ORDER BY ca.create_time DESC

SELECT ca.*, u.username AS user_name, c.name AS coach_name FROM coach_appointment ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON ca.coach_id = c.id WHERE ca.coach_id = #{param1} AND ca.status = #{param2} ORDER BY ca.create_time DESC

SELECT ca.*, u.username AS user_name, c.name AS coach_name FROM coach_appointment ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON ca.coach_id = c.id WHERE ca.coach_id = #{coachId} AND ca.appointment_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY ca.appointment_time ASC
